notes: All uptime checks failed due to environment-level network restrictions. WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for all 7 sites simultaneously, indicating the WebFetch proxy IP is blocked by Cloudflare/WAF on these domains (not actual site downtime). Direct outbound connectivity is unavailable in this sandbox (openssl s_client cannot handshake). SSL expiry data is unavailable. Sites are expected to be operational — this is a check infrastructure limitation, not a site outage. This is a persistent issue across multiple daily runs (same result on 2026-04-05 through 2026-04-09).
